'''gathomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibby|nibby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibby|nibby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gathomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthemeth|gæthemeth]] || [[word:gæthemej|gæthemej]] || [[word:gæthemesh|gæthemesh]] || [[word:gætheme|gætheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathothomoth|gathothomoth]] || [[word:gathothomoj|gathothomoj]] || [[word:gathothomosh|gathothomosh]] || [[word:gathothomo|gathothomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathomoth|gathomoth]] || [[word:gathomoj|gathomoj]] || [[word:gathomosh|gathomosh]] || [[word:gathomo|gathomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathofmoth|gathofmoth]] || [[word:gathofmoj|gathofmoj]] || [[word:gathofmosh|gathofmosh]] || [[word:gathofmof|gathofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathomotho|gathomotho]] || [[word:gathomojo|gathomojo]] || [[word:gathomosho|gathomosho]] || [[word:gathomoko|gathomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathomoth|gathomoth]] || [[word:gathomoj|gathomoj]] || [[word:gathomosh|gathomosh]] || [[word:gathomo|gathomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathomothol|gathomothol]] || [[word:gathomojol|gathomojol]] || [[word:gathomoshol|gathomoshol]] || [[word:gathomokol|gathomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathomothotho|gathomothotho]] || [[word:gathomojojo|gathomojojo]] || [[word:gathomoshosho|gathomoshosho]] || [[word:gathomoko|gathomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathomothon|gathomothon]] || [[word:gathomojon|gathomojon]] || [[word:gathomoshon|gathomoshon]] || [[word:gathomokon|gathomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathomothoro|gathomothoro]] || [[word:gathomojoro|gathomojoro]] || [[word:gathomoshoro|gathomoshoro]] || [[word:gathomokoro|gathomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
